one_line: Wrote a ~1,135-word (2-page) honest YC/fundraising memo: problem (SRE autonomy + the cascade trap), insight (graduation/code-as-policy, frozen model), evidence (real A1/A2 numbers: first-try 0.23->0.90, reproduced on a 2nd model 0.24->0.89, McNemar p<0.0001, plus the honest rex_no_oracle~=baseline), market/wedge (eval+data engine) and ask; every number traced to A1/A2 in evidence_check.md; 8/8 validation tests pass; no shared core file touched.
